ddls:
CREATE TABLE "team_scores" (
  "team_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team score */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the round */,
  "to_par" INTEGER /* Score relative to par for the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standings entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "place" TEXT /* Current place in the tournament */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score for the tournament */,
  "to_par" INTEGER /* Total score relative to par for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is active in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, coach, player, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view scores, update scores) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "score_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the tournament */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (null if team award) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (null if player award) */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (null if team statistic) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (null if player statistic) */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)
